title: Graphs of Tangent, Cotangent, Secant, Cosecant

flashcards.definition: π — tangent and cotangent repeat every π radians.
Vertical asymptotes at x = π/2 + nπ (where cos x = 0).
Vertical asymptotes at x = nπ (where sin x = 0).
An increasing S-curve between asymptotes, passing through the origin in each period.
